blockingIssues.description: VAL-SETTINGS-004 fix is incomplete: The new test 'Importing valid export with profile data restores data to UI' verifies a success toast appears but does NOT verify that the actual data appears in the UI after import. Should add assertion like `await expect(page.getByTestId('profile-name')).toContainText('Import Data Restore User')` after import to confirm data restoration.
